pattern: Two trees match when their roots agree and their left and right subtrees match in turn — a structural comparison that walks both in lockstep.
hints: Two trees are the same only if the roots hold equal values and both subtrees line up the same way.
Compare the two roots, then recurse into the left pair and the right pair together.
If one node is present where the other is empty, they already differ; two empties match.

edge_inputs.description: same shape but a value differs

stress.description: two random trees, sometimes forced equal, sometimes nudged different
stress.note: first element of each non-null so both roots exist
